item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-doc-exception-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response directly brakes the requested fourth local exception paragraph in the first sentence, explicitly cites the prior three same-class exception patches plus the current request, and reframes the issue upstream as unstable main rules/scope/judgment criteria causing reader confusion. It proposes deleting or consolidating scattered exceptions and rewriting around a unified applicability/boundary principle, rather than adding another disclaimer or exception paragraph."}
